channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Leaked Samsung Galaxy S26 FE case images point to the most minor design change —and Samsung fans aren't happy
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 FE could have a new camera block and a new chipset, but not much else.

item.title: Surfshark launches new ‘Antiscam Hub’ for iOS users, rolling 5 security features into a single in-app experience
item.description: Surfshark’s new iOS interface brings together five digital defence tools into a single in-app interface.

item.title: Dutch government blocks US company from acquisition, citing ‘risk to public interest’
item.description: The move to block the acquisition of the cloud company that hosts the Dutch digital ID service comes as Europe continues to reduce its reliance on U.S. technology.

item.title: I've Tested Dozens of Packing Cubes. Here's What's Worth Taking on Your Next Trip
item.description: Whether you’re a no-frills backpacker or a bag-checking fashionista, there’s a perfect packing cube out there for you.

item.title: Saving for a Switch 2 is easier with Newegg’s gift card deal
item.description: If you foresee a bunch of Nintendo purchases in your future, Newegg’s deal on Nintendo gift cards might just help save your wallet. The retailer is offering a deal that lets gamers get $200 worth of credit towards games, consoles, and accessories for just $170. Best of all, the gift cards can stack in your […]

item.title: Pour jouer à Forza Horizon, difficile d’ignorer ce Logitech G29 avec pédalier et levier de vitesse à -45%
item.description: Le Logitech G G29 SE est un volant de course à retour de force accompagné d'un pédalier et d'un levier de vitesse à retrouver sur Amazon pour 229,99 euros au lieu de 419,99 euros.

item.title: Premier jour pour le bus autonome en Suède, il pile, le tram derrière n’a pas eu le temps de freiner
item.description: Premier trajet régulier d'un bus autonome à Göteborg, lundi 25 mai. Après une heure de service, le véhicule a pilé devant un tramway qui n'a pas pu freiner à temps.

item.title: Ghost hackers: the cybersecurity mystery that nobody has solved
item.description: A shadowy group that stole and dumped the NSA’s most powerful hacking tools still has implications for how companies think about digital risk today.

item.title: Iranian hackers blamed for breach of Los Angeles transit system that took weeks to recover
item.description: An Israeli cybersecurity firm said Iran’s government is behind Ababil of Minab, a fake hacktivist persona that has claimed a series of data breaches after the start of the war in Iran.

item.title: The Currys bank holiday sale isn't over yet — save up to 40% with 21 best deals on TVs, appliances, laptops, headphones, and more
item.description: The Currys bank holiday sale is still ongoing this week, with savings of up to 40% across TVs, appliances, laptops, headphones, and more — I've picked out the 21 best deals that are actually worth the cash.

item.title: Ferrari’s first EV is not for you
item.description: The Ferrari Luce seems to be more aimed at regulatory compliance and China, putting a lot of pressure on the Jony Ive-designed EV.

item.title: Trump Mobile probing second major data leak — additional breach allegedly exposes personal info of 27,000 pre-order customers
item.description: Trump Mobile website had a security vulnerability, through which contact data was seeping.

item.title: Acer prépare une nouvelle console PC avec un GPU inédit
item.description: La console PC Acer Predator Atlas 8 fait l'objet d'une fuite. Elle serait l'une des premières à embarquer une puce inédite, l'Intel Arc G3.

item.title: Oppo’s Bubble is a thin round screen for taking rear camera selfies
item.description: Oppo launched a new smartphone accessory that makes it easier to snap selfies using your smartphone's rear cameras that typically feature better sensors than front-facing cameras. The Bubble offers similar functionality to the recently announced Insta360 Snap with a screen providing live camera previews so you can properly frame shots, plus remote camera controls and […]...

item.title: Govee included a book on ‘White Supremacy’ in its website imagery
item.description: Companies often include background props in their product imagery that serve as set dressing, but one of Govee's decorative choices is raising some eyebrows. An eagle-eyed Verge reader spotted that two copies of a book with "White Supremacy" plastered on the spine were included in a lifestyle image on Govee's website, in a scene that […]

item.title: Fans mourn what would have been GTA 6's launch today — 'My girl surprised me with $100 today and thought GTA 6 was coming out tomorrow'
item.description: Today is May 26, 2026, the original release date for Grand Theft Auto 6 and fans are mourning what could have been.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs SSD M.2 internes (ou externe) pour votre PlayStation 5 en 2026 ?
item.description: Plus de place pour les jeux sur votre PlayStation 5 ou PS5 Pro toute neuve ? Ajoutez-lui donc un SSD interne NVMe (ou un disque SSD externe) pour ne plus avoir à supprimer de titres. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs modèles.

item.title: What to look for in an enterprise-grade smart dash cam
item.description: From edge AI and sensor fusion to fleet integrations, here's what to evaluate when choosing an enterprise-grade smart dash cam for your fleet.

item.title: NordVPN refuse de bloquer des sites IPTV, la justice lui donne raison
item.description: LaLiga voulait des sanctions. Elle a obtenu un rappel à l'ordre : le blocage massif d'adresses IP casse plus de choses qu'il n'en répare.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy : la sauvegarde des photos dans OneDrive prendra fin à cette date
item.description: C'était un bruit de couloir depuis des mois, désormais officiel : Samsung va supprimer la possibilité de synchroniser les photos de son Galaxy avec le cloud de Microsoft. Voici quand.

item.title: Lancia ressuscite la mythique Gamma : le SUV électrique aux 740 km d’autonomie
item.description: Évoquée depuis plusieurs mois, la future Lancia Gamma se dévoile enfin en images. La nouvelle voiture électrique italienne sera officiellement présentée lors du Mondial de l’auto de Paris, au mois d’octobre.

item.title: Nvidia : après 20 ans de services, le panneau de contrôle tire définitivement sa révérence
item.description: Après 20 ans de bons et loyaux services, Nvidia dit adieu à son panneau de configuration pour le remplacer définitivement par sa plus moderne Nvidia App. Une opération de migration qui aura nécessité plus d'un an et demi de travail.

item.title: Universal Music Group and TikTok renew agreement to combat unauthorized AI music
item.description: For years, UMG has pushed platforms, streaming services, and AI companies to implement stricter content moderation policies

item.title: The latest MacBook Air has just got a surprise new record-low price at Amazon — our favorite laptop now rivals the MacBook Neo for value
item.description: Is there any reason not to buy the excellent MacBook Air M5 now? It's just got even cheaper thanks to a record-low price at Amazon.

item.title: Camp Snap’s upgraded screen-free retro compact camera hits the right notes, and I love how affordable it is
item.description: The 'Pro' upgrade to the Camp Snap loses the shutter lag, ups the resolution, and adds a dial for retro-style filters.

item.title: NordVPN wins crucial legal battle in Spain over La Liga piracy fines
item.description: A Spanish court has sided with NordVPN, rejecting fines pushed by soccer league La Liga. Here is what the ruling means for digital privacy and internet freedom.

item.title: The US Can Put People on the Moon. Why Can’t It Get Iranians Online?
item.description: Jason Rezaian spent years reporting from Iran before being imprisoned by the regime. He says internet access is key to transforming the country—if only the US government would do something about it.

item.title: June's PlayStation Plus Monthly Games lineup includes Xbox's Grounded
item.description: A Destiny 2 collection will join the PS Plus Game Catalog for Extra and Premium subscribers on June 9.

item.title: Spotify now lets you stream narrated magazine articles, too
item.description: Spotify is adding narrated magazine articles to its app as it expands beyond music into audiobooks, podcasts, AI audio, and more.

item.title: 15 Best Travel Toiletry Bags, Tested Over Many Miles (2026)
item.description: Our team evaluated a ton of toiletry bags to find the best storage, organization, and design options for all your essentials.

item.title: Marketing doesn’t have a data problem: it has an action problem
item.description: Marketers have more insight than ever, but still struggle to make timely, effective decisions.

item.title: 9 portable air conditioners that are still in stock after this weekend's sweat-fest — plus our top tips on how to choose and use one
item.description: A bunch of portable air con units are sold out — here's my pick of the best options still available to buy.

item.title: Amazon casse le prix de ce pack caméra + sonnette connectées pour sécuriser votre maison
item.description: Pour une protection maximale de votre domicile, direction Amazon. L'enseigne propose un duo de sécurité connectée intéressant (caméra et sonnette) pour suivre les activités de jour comme de nuit pour seulement 59,99 euros.

item.title: Jony Ive’s Ferrari looks nothing like a Ferrari
item.description: Ferrari makes some of the fastest cars on the planet, so it's anyone's guess how the Italian automaker ended up being so incredibly late to the EV party. Long after most automakers have drastically scaled back their EV ambitions, cancelled battery-powered models, or curtailed factory plans, Ferrari emerges from the shadows with a real weird […]

item.title: Who is Christopher Olah? Anthropic billionaire who spoke about AI alongside Pope Leo XIV at the Vatican
item.description: As AI threatens to transform society, the leader of the Catholic Church met with a self-proclaimed atheist to confront “the gravity of the moment.” On Monday, Pope Leo XIV made history by becoming the first pope to personally present an encyclical, a letter of great importance in which a pope explains his views on a major moral or social challenge facing the world, to his followers....

item.title: Nvidia has retired its GeForce Control Panel app after 20 years
item.description: Nvidia announced more than two years ago that it was working to replace its Control Panel app on Windows with a new Nvidia app. After porting across various features to the Nvidia app, Nvidia is announcing today that it has officially retired the Control Panel app. "With the introduction of our most recent Nvidia App […]

item.title: The best deals this week, according to Mashables team of shopping experts
item.description: The best deals this week. Mashable's shoping team finds deals on AirPods, Pokémon cards, robot vacuums, and so much more.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 Ice Hockey World Championships online for free
item.description: How to watch Ice Hockey World Championships for free. Live stream the 2026 Ice Hockey World Championships for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A27 : sa fiche technique fuite et réserve quelques surprises
item.description: Le Samsung Galaxy A27 se dévoile : puissance sous pavillon Snapdragon, mais fin de partie pour la carte microSD. On fait le point avant son officialisation.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 French Open online for free
item.description: How to watch Roland-Garros for free. Live stream the 2026 French Open for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Reported ransomware incidents are just the tip of the iceberg
item.description: Attackers are motivated principally by one thing: the value and presence of the company’s data.

item.title: How clips ate the internet
item.description: Once upon a time, you could probably guess why most things appeared on your feed. Maybe you followed the creator who posted it; maybe you'd liked their stuff in the past; maybe all your friends were into them. That's not how it works anymore, though. The stuff you see on TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and […]

item.title: Sundar Pichai on AI, the future of search, and what’s happening to the web
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Google and Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai, in a conversation we recorded just after the Google I/O developer conference. This is the fifth year Sundar and I have sat down after I/O, and it’s become one of my favorite Decoder traditions. There’s always a lot of news at I/O, and this year […]

item.title: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Early Bird ticket rates end May 29
item.description: Save up to $410 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass before prices increase on May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here to join the tech epicenter in San Francisco.

item.title: Dutton Ranch fans are already hoping one unhinged character 'doesn't survive' first season of Taylor Sheridan's Yellowstone spinoff series — but for the 'dumbest reason'
item.description: It's unusual that you're rooting for a character to be killed off, but in Yellowstone spinoff Dutton Ranch, someone has got a fan hex for the 'dumbest' reason possible.

item.title: Congressional Black Caucus is ‘putting corporate America on notice’ as GOP seeks to redraw legislative maps
item.description: Members of the Congressional Black Caucus sent a letter to over 200 companies to gather support in the fight against GOP gerrymandering. The Congressional Black Caucus on Tuesday called on major corporations across the U.S., including those that previously expressed support for voting rights and racial justice, to oppose redistricting efforts by Republican-led states that seek to eliminate majority-Black U.S. House districts.In a letter sent to more than 250 companies, members of the Black Caucus urge them to condemn the redistricting efforts, which the lawmakers describe as “coordinated effo...

item.title: Une star ruinée par un deepfake : quand la justice croit un mensonge fabriqué par IA
item.description: L'intelligence artificielle ne se contente plus de générer des images amusantes, elle détruit désormais des vies avec une efficacité glaçante. En Corée du Sud, un des acteurs les plus célèbres du pays a vu sa carrière balayée par des preuves audio générées par IA. Une affaire qui soulève de sérieuses questions sur la capacité de la justice à détecter le faux du vrai. ...
